title: Bots in Public — Day 1: Starting from Zero

data.heading: Nobody shows you Day 1.
data.subtitle: Every AI tutorial starts mid-project. I'm not skipping it. →

data.heading: I'm building an AI business live
data.subtitle: Review Recovery. One day at a time. Every mistake included.

data.heading: Create the folder
data.subtitle:
mkdir ~/Projects/bip

Most people never get past this step.
They're waiting to feel ready.
You're never ready. Start anyway.

data.heading: Create CLAUDE.md
data.subtitle:
This is the AI's memory.

Without it, Claude forgets everything every session. CLAUDE.md is a briefing note for your AI.

data.heading: Create .env + git init
data.subtitle:
Your API keys live here. Never share it.

git init → your time machine.
Commit even on Day 1.
